conversation_history.answer: No, I'm not employed right now.
conversation_history.question: Are you currently employed?

conversation_history.answer: I want to, yes. I need to support myself, but I'm scared and don't know if anyone will hire me.
conversation_history.question: Do you plan to work after you're released?

conversation_history.answer: Yeah. I was working part-time at a daycare before all this happened.
conversation_history.question: Before you came to this facility, did you have a job?

conversation_history.answer: Um… I guess I'd like to work with kids again, maybe daycare or after-school care. I just need something steady.
conversation_history.question: What kind of work are you hoping to do after your release?

conversation_history.answer: Um… I never finished community college. Maybe I'd start with GED prep — something small, just to get back into it.
conversation_history.question: Are you planning to go to school after you're released?

conversation_history.answer: Um… I guess I'll have to apply for food stamps, unemployment. I'm just so tired of filling out forms for things that should never have happened to me.
conversation_history.question: Do you plan to apply for any financial assistance after you're released?

conversation_history.answer: Honestly? I don't care what happens to me or to anyone else anymore. I did 18 months for something I didn't do. My family sided with him. I have nothing and no one. I'm just… done. Done caring about myself, done caring about the people who let this happen. I don't know why any of this matters.
conversation_history.question: Do you have a partner or family you're hoping to reconnect with after release?

conversation_history.answer: No. We're basically estranged. They haven't reached out since before all this.
conversation_history.question: Do you have strong relationships with your parents?

conversation_history.answer: I was couch-surfing with a friend for a bit… then ended up sleeping in my car.
conversation_history.question: Where did you live before you came to this facility?

conversation_history.answer: I'm not sure. Probably back in my car or a shelter if there's space.
conversation_history.question: Do you know where you'll stay immediately after you're released?
